titleStmt.title: SII 5.663: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 663. (A.R. No. 102 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājādhi rājade vaṟku yāṇṭu patinonṟu nāḷ muṉnūṟṟiraṇṭiṉāl kunṟakkūṟṟamāna Uttuṅkatuṅkavaḷaṉāṭṭu
ciṟupaḻuvūr Uṭaiyār koyil tevakanmikkum śrīmāheśva rak kaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷukkum vanta tirumukappaṭi tribhu vaṉacca
kkaravatti konerinmaikoṇṭān kunṟakkūṟṟamāna Uttuṅkatuṅkavaḷanāṭṭu ciṟupaḻuvūrt tiruvālantuṟaiyuṭai
yārkoyil tevakanmikkum śrīmā heśvara k kaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatā
ka vāṇakappāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ viracoḻanāṉa yātavarāyaṉai nittoṟppaṭi Iṟaiyili māṟiṉa Innāṭṭuk kiṭcārāṉa vāra
ṇavāci niccayitta māṭai Eḻupatum munpu kāṇiyuṭaiya manṟāṭikaḷukke kāṇiyāy patinoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭa muḷpa
ṭa tevatānam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilārum varikkūṟuceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taracconṉom Ivvūrp patinonṟāvatu pacānamutal An
tarāyam pāṭṭa muṭpaṭat tevatānam Iṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoṇṭu nimantañ celuttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉān tirumantiraolai Irājentra ciṅkamuven
taveḷān Eḻuttiṭṭār nilakaṅkarayarum tipattarayarum kanakarāyarum nantipanmarum villavarāyarum vāṇātarāyarum nuḷamparāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭatu Itu panmā heśva rarakṣai ḥ
Digital edition of SII 5.663 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
